honest_scope: PARITY-with-leaders cell, not a mnemo-uniqueness claim; graph-memory leaders (Zep, Graphiti) are also bi-temporal and are not run here.

not_run.zep: documented bi-temporal (valid + transaction time, point-in-time) -- expected PARITY; not run
not_run.graphiti: documented bi-temporal (valid_at/invalid_at + created_at) -- expected PARITY; not run
